name: ridwans2/raja-modular-core
description: A professional, framework-agnostic modular architecture for Laravel 11+. Features zero-config autoloading, 29+ Artisan command overrides, and seamless Vite integration.

suggest.ridwans2/raja-modular-livewire: Provides automatic Livewire component discovery and registration within modules.
suggest.ridwans2/raja-modular-js: Enables JS discovery within modular structures and provides zero-config autoloading for modules.
suggest.ridwans2/raja-modular-filament: Enables Filament v5 admin panel integration with automatic discovery in modules.
suggest.ridwans2/filament-themer-luncher: Provides a comprehensive Filament v5 interface for managing and switching themes.
suggest.ridwans2/filament-modular-luncher: A powerful Filament v5 manager for listing, toggling, and backing up system modules.
suggest.ridwans2/raja-hooks: Adds a universal extensibility and plugin system for Laravel applications.
